author: AAA3A
opencode-contributor
name: Honeypot
install_msg:
Thank you for installing this cog!
Do `[p]help Honeypot` to get the list of commands and their description.
short: Create a honeypot channel to catch self bots/scammers with purge, whitelist roles, fake activity, and mod review.
description: Create a honeypot channel at the top of the server to attract self bots/scammers. Features include: configurable punishment (mute/kick/ban), automatic message purge for the last N minutes, whitelisted role exceptions, fake activity simulation to lure scammers, and optional moderator review queue with interactive buttons for manual judgment.
end_user_data_statement: This cog does not persistently store data or metadata about users.
